# Security Policy

## Supported Versions
We maintain the latest release of the Ethical Hacking Labs repository.

| Version | Supported |
| :---: | :---: |
| 1.0.x |  Yes  |

## Educational Safety Guardrails
This project is strictly educational. It does NOT distribute offensive malware payloads, remote execution modules, or system evasion frameworks.

## Reporting a Vulnerability
If you discover a security flaw in our laboratory scripts or container configuration that could lead to unauthorized local escalation outside the sandbox boundaries, please do not file a public Github issue. 

Instead, report it safely by email to the repository maintainer. We aim to remediate all valid security configurations within 48 hours.
